mechanics.excerpt: For subskills listed as Any, the player may cnoose any sub- skill, appropriate his character'$ affiliation and back ground; For example, character granted Interest /Any Skill mignt choose take Interest /Hiking perhaps Interest/Science Fiction_ You can add these Skill Points to a Any Subskill of the same type whether it is one your character has already earned or a entirely new subskill For example player who chose Interest/Hiking receives another Interest / Any Skill; he can add those Skill Points t0 the Hiking Skill or use them for new Interest Skiii: Occupational Fields Most professions entail certain skills_ Mw3 arranges these sets of skills in occupational fields.
